sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position Size (units) = Total Equity × Optimal f / Biggest Loss. Dollar Amount Per Unit = Biggest Loss / Optimal f. Requires prior calculation of optimal f from historical trade sequence geometric mean analysis.

source_rule_text: Divide the biggest loss by the negative optimal f value to determine the dollar amount per unit to trade, then trade 1 unit for every dollar amount of equity equal to this result.
